app.name: Lazygit
app.one_liner: A terminal-based UI for Git that simplifies common and advanced Git operations through an intuitive, keyboard-driven interface.

screens.name: Main Status View
screens.purpose: Display high-level Git status including changed files, branches, recent commits, and worktrees.

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and display repository items like files, commits, or branches.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user changes such as staged hunks or commit messages.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for viewing commit history
week 1: Implement core file listing and staging logic
acceptance_tests: Nested worktree paths are correctly resolved without 'null' segments.
User can reword non-HEAD commits using `git history reword` instead of `git rebase -i`.
